Query.tables: AEA CPRF PF PRF CPRA PA PRA REF
Query.Join: CPRF.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND CPRF.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_FOR_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPRF.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_FOR_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPRF.PARTY_ID = PF.PARTY_ID AND CPRF.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = PRF.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPRA.CASE_NUMBER = AEA.CASE_NUMBER AND CPRA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPRA.CASE_PARTY_NO = AEA.PARTY_AGAINST_CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPRA.PARTY_ID = PA.PARTY_ID AND CPRA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = PRA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND AEA.AE_TYPE = REF.RV_LOW_VALUE AND REF.RV_DOMAIN = 'AE_TYPE'

Alias.name: EVENT857_COUNT
Alias.select: ( SELECT COUNT(ae.std_event_id) FROM ae_events ae WHERE ae.ae_number = AEA.AE_NUMBER AND ae.std_event_id = '857' )
